title: Create Api that allow us to query board by name
excerpt: I’m developing a feature that allows users to work with multiple boards, but I currently lack a method to query boards without exceeding the API limit (excepts page and limit). Please consider creating this functionality…

posts.author: thinhle183 (Thinh Le)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m developing a feature that allows users to work with multiple boards, but I currently lack a method to query boards without exceeding the API limit (excepts page and limit). Please consider creating this functionality.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @thinhle183 for the request!

Everybody: You can vote for this at the top of the screen!
